rationale: Ζ-B0..Ζ-B2 completed the required later-wave reconciliation, prerequisite matrix, and gate-freeze band.
That band converted later-wave candidacy into one explicit admitted-with-cautions family while preserving the rest of the blocker stack.
Ζ-B2 admits zeta.family.live_cutover_receipt_pipeline_anchorization only with cautions in a shadow or parallel evidence posture.
No other later-wave family received gate passage.
The required narrow planning band has already been completed by Ζ-B0..Ζ-B2.
What remains is guarded execution of the admitted family plus an immediate follow-on checkpoint.

Broader Ζ remains blocked by replication proof, replay and proof-anchor continuity realization, runtime cutover proof, trust convergence, live trust and publication execution realization, live receipt-pipeline realization, and relocation execution.
Later-wave admission does not change those broader blocker truths.
The later-wave refresh band now provides one explicit later-wave admission consequence instead of leaving later-wave scope vague.
That admission is narrow and guardrail-heavy: only live cutover receipt pipeline anchorization may enter, and only in a shadow or parallel evidence posture.
Trust roots remain empty, trust and replication registries remain provisional, and canonical live receipt-pipeline realization remains unresolved.
cautions: Later-wave bounded Ζ is not broadly ready.
Admitted-with-cautions posture does not equal canonical live receipt-pipeline realization.
First-wave families remain bounded-only or proof-only unless a later checkpoint explicitly says otherwise.

later_wave_family_findings.title: Live cutover receipt pipeline and anchorization
reason: Ζ-B2 assigns this family admitted-with-cautions posture.
The family can remain inside a shadow or parallel evidence posture without claiming canonical live receipt-pipeline realization.
required_guardrails: shadow or parallel evidence posture only
no promotion of local logs, traces, mirrors, or CI output into canonical receipts
no live trust, revocation, or publication execution
FULL review for any evidence reclassification

later_wave_family_findings.title: Trust-aware refusal and containment
reason: Ζ-B2 keeps this family review-gated rather than ordinarily admitted.
Trust roots remain empty, trust policy posture remains provisional, and distributed trust convergence remains unresolved.
required_guardrails: no trust-root promotion, rotation, or live revocation execution

later_wave_family_findings.title: Bounded authority handoff and state transfer
reason: The family still sits on unresolved replication proof, replay continuity realization, cutover legality, trust convergence, and receipt-pipeline blockers.
First-wave verification and rehearsal doctrine must not be reinterpreted as authority-transfer proof.

later_wave_family_findings.title: Live trust, revocation, and publication execution
reason: Trust roots remain empty and trust policy posture remains provisional.
Live execution machinery remains unrealized.

later_wave_family_findings.title: Live shard relocation
reason: Relocation still depends on nearly the full unresolved realization stack.
The family remains future-only perimeter and outside current later-wave bounded planning.

first_wave_freeze_findings.title: Rollback-bearing staged transition validation
reason: Ζ-A0 froze the family as bounded, staged, rollback-bearing, refusal-aware, and non-realized.
No later-wave refresh artifact widened it.
may_widen_only_under: explicit later checkpoint narrowing of the relevant authority-transfer trust and receipt blockers
named widening rather than inferred widening

first_wave_freeze_findings.title: Distributed replay and proof-anchor verification
reason: Ζ-A1 froze the family as proof-only blocker-reduction work.
No later-wave gate converts replay verification into distributed continuity realization.
may_widen_only_under: explicit blocker narrowing for proof-anchor continuity realization
explicit checkpoint law preserving proof-versus-realization boundaries

first_wave_freeze_findings.title: Bounded runtime cutover proof rehearsal
reason: Ζ-A2 froze the family as rehearsal-only and proof-only.
Later-wave admission did not convert rehearsal into live runtime cutover or live receipt-pipeline realization.
may_widen_only_under: explicit lawful cutover proof narrowing across hotswap and distributed-authority boundaries
explicit checkpoint approval that keeps rehearsal distinct from realization

zeta_blockers_or_prerequisites.reason: The required later-wave refresh band is complete and no longer blocks the single admitted family.
Proof-backed deterministic replication and lawful state-partition transfer remain unrealized.
Replay and proof-anchor verification law exists, but realized distributed continuity does not.
Cutover-proof rehearsal exists, but lawful runtime cutover proof across the frozen boundaries remains unresolved.
Trust-aware doctrine exists, but convergence realization remains absent and trust roots remain empty.
Trust, revocation, and publication law remains explicit, but live execution remains unrealized.
Receipt anchorization may proceed in shadow form, but canonical live receipt-pipeline realization remains future work.
Relocation remains perimeter-only and outside current later-wave bounded entry.
Cluster-of-clusters and similar shapes remain beyond bounded near-term Ζ.

must_avoid_replacing: refreshed later-wave gate truth with convenience widening
first-wave bounded or proof-only doctrine with realization drift
empty trust-root and provisional policy posture with optimistic paraphrase
active checkpoint law with stale blueprint numbering or aspirational zeta lists

ownership_projection_cautions: fields/ remains canonical semantic field substrate while field/ remains transitional
schema/ remains canonical semantic contract law while schemas/ remains validator-facing projection
packs/ remains canonical runtime packaging authority while data/packs/ remains scoped authored-pack authority
canonical prose and semantic specs outrank projected or generated mirrors
the thin runtime/ root is not canonical by name alone
refreshed later-wave gates must not be loosened because nearby code surfaces exist

reason: The required later-wave reconciliation, matrix, and gate-refresh band is complete.
That band honestly admits exactly one later-wave family, and only with cautions.
No further narrow planning work is required before that single-family entry.
The remaining later-wave and broader Ζ families still stay review-gated, deferred, blocked, or future-only.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Ζ-B3 checkpoint may refine readiness judgments and follow-on sequencing without replacing the checkpoint law frozen here
